name: 01.AI Yi
description: Registers 01.AI Yi as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback 01.AI API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternate fallback 01.AI/Lingyi API key used when no api_key Plugin Setting or YI_API_KEY is configured.

settings.label: 01.AI API key
settings.description: 01.AI API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to YI_API_KEY, then LINGYI_API_KEY.

providers.name: 01.AI Yi
providers.description: Refreshes 01.AI Yi chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
